name: w/d multi-benefit dry dog food
description: hill's prescription diet w/d multi-benefitis uniquely formulated to benefit your pet on multiple levels: urinary health, digestive health, blood sugar  management and weight management. this blend of balanced nutrients and soluble and insoluble fibers works on multiple fronts to help help pets live a happy & healthy life. 처방 유효 농도의 l-카르니틴 함량 높은 섬유소 함량으로 혈당관리 도움 용해성 섬유소과 불용성 섬유소의 최적 포뮬러 방광 환경을 최적화하여 비뇨기 건강 지원
